interfaces.name: getHelpCenterHomeData
interfaces.description: Get data for the Help Center home page, including main categories, highlighted topics, device entry points, saved articles preview, and generic contact options.

interfaces.name: searchHelpArticles
interfaces.description: Run a global Help Center article search with optional topic, device, plan, rating, and maturity filters plus sort and pagination. Used for the Search Results page and internal searches like 'update card'.

parameters.name: queryText
parameters.description: Full-text query, e.g., '4K streaming requirements', 'VC_201 error', 'download limits Standard plan', 'update card'.

topicCodes.description: Optional list of Topic.code filters, e.g., ['streaming_quality'], ['downloads'].

deviceCodes.description: Optional list of Device.code filters, e.g., ['computer'], ['smart_tv'].

planCodes.description: Optional list of Plan.code filters, e.g., ['standard'].

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order: 'relevance', 'last_updated_newest', or 'highest_rated'.

queryId.description: Identifier of the persisted SearchQuery record.

interfaces.name: getHelpSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Help Center search results page, including topics, devices, plans, ratings, maturity levels, and sort orders.

interfaces.name: getCategoryLandingData
interfaces.description: Get data for a category landing page, including subcategories, featured articles, and breadcrumb info.

parameters.name: categoryCode
parameters.description: Category.code for the selected category, e.g., 'account_billing', 'account_profiles', 'watching_on_tv'.

interfaces.name: getSubcategoryArticleList
interfaces.description: Get the article list for a specific subcategory, with optional internal search, rating and maturity filters, and sorting. Used for subcategories like 'Canceling your subscription', 'Payment methods & charges', 'Parental controls & PINs', 'Streaming issues'.

parameters.name: subcategoryId
parameters.description: ID of the Subcategory as selected via navigation/URL.

parameters.name: searchText
parameters.description: Optional internal search text within this subcategory, e.g., 'update card'.

parameters.name: minRating
parameters.description: Optional minimum average rating filter, e.g., 4.0, 4.5.

parameters.name: maturityLevel
parameters.description: Optional maturity filter, e.g., 'teens', 'older_kids'.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'highest_rated', 'last_updated_newest'.

interfaces.name: getDevicesOverview
interfaces.description: Get the Devices page overview, listing supported devices and basic descriptions.

interfaces.name: getDeviceHelpTopics
interfaces.description: Get the help topics overview for a specific device (Device Help Topics page), such as Getting started, Subtitles, Streaming quality, Downloads, App issues.

parameters.name: deviceCode
parameters.description: Device.code, e.g., 'android_phone_tablet', 'smart_tv', 'computer', 'set_top_box'.

interfaces.name: getDeviceTopicArticleList
interfaces.description: Get the article list for a given device and topic combination, such as Android 'Subtitles, captions & audio', with optional rating filters and sorting.

parameters.name: deviceCode
parameters.description: Device.code, e.g., 'android_phone_tablet'.

parameters.name: topicCode
parameters.description: Topic.code, e.g., 'subtitles_captions_audio', 'streaming_quality', 'downloads'.

parameters.name: minRating
parameters.description: Optional minimum average rating filter, e.g., 4.5.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'highest_rated', 'last_updated_newest'.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full article detail for the Article Detail page, including localized body, sections, related articles, save state, and available contact options.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to display (from navigation or URL).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Desired article language code, e.g., 'en', 'es'. If omitted, uses the article's default_language.

bodyHtml.description: Full article body in the requested language as HTML/markdown.

defaultSupportTopic.description: Default SupportRequest.topic from the article, e.g., 'streaming_quality', 'downloads', 'parental_controls', 'billing', 'technical_issue', 'generic'.

defaultErrorCode.description: Error code associated with the article, e.g., 'VC_201'.

interfaces.name: saveArticle
interfaces.description: Save/bookmark an article to the Saved Articles list. Creates SavedArticle state internally if needed.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to save (from current Article Detail page).

savedAt.description: ISO datetime when the article was saved.

interfaces.name: unsaveArticle
interfaces.description: Remove an article from the Saved Articles list.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to remove from saved articles.

interfaces.name: submitArticleFeedback
interfaces.description: Submit feedback about whether an article was helpful or not (e.g., clicking 'Yes' or 'This article was helpful').

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article for which feedback is submitted.

parameters.name: helpful
parameters.description: true if the article was helpful, false otherwise.

interfaces.name: getSavedArticlesList
interfaces.description: Get the full Saved Articles page content, including saved article details with sorting options.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order for saved articles, e.g., 'date_saved_newest', 'date_saved_oldest', 'category', 'title'.

interfaces.name: getGenericContactSupportConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the generic Contact Support entry point (e.g., from Help Center home), including available topics and contact methods.

parameters.name: sourcePageType
parameters.description: Source page type, e.g., 'help_center_home', 'search_results', 'category', 'subcategory', 'devices', 'device_help', 'other'.

interfaces.name: getContactSupportConfigForArticle
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the Contact Support page when opened from an article (e.g., 'Contact support about this issue' or from contact options with wait times). Pre-fills topic and error code where appropriate.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Source Article.id for the support request.

parameters.name: contactOptionId
parameters.description: Optional ContactOption.id representing the contact method the user clicked.

interfaces.name: submitSupportRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a support request via web form, email-style form, or similar. Used for non-chat flows like buffering issues from an article.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: SupportRequest.topic, e.g., 'streaming_quality', 'billing', 'downloads', 'parental_controls', 'generic'.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Short subject line, e.g., 'Frequent buffering on my smart TV'.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Full description of the issue.

parameters.name: contactMethod
parameters.description: Contact method type, e.g., 'web_form', 'email', 'phone'. For non-chat flows.

parameters.name: errorCode
parameters.description: Optional error code associated with the issue, e.g., 'VC_201'.

parameters.name: sourcePageType
parameters.description: Source of the request, e.g., 'article', 'help_center_home', 'search_results', 'category', 'subcategory', 'devices', 'device_help', 'other'.

parameters.name: sourceArticleId
parameters.description: ID of the source article if applicable.

interfaces.name: startSupportChat
interfaces.description: Start a support chat (or equivalent fastest real-time contact) for a given issue, often from an error-code article like VC_201.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: SupportRequest.topic, e.g., 'streaming_quality', 'technical_issue'.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Short summary of the issue.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Details of the issue provided before chat starts.

parameters.name: errorCode
parameters.description: Error code such as 'VC_201'.

parameters.name: sourcePageType
parameters.description: Source context, e.g., 'article', 'search_results'.

parameters.name: sourceArticleId
parameters.description: ID of the article where chat was initiated, if any.

chatSessionId.description: Opaque identifier for the chat session if applicable.

interfaces.name: getPaymentSettingsView
interfaces.description: Get the Payment Settings page data, including current billing country and payment method, plus selectable country options.

helpArticleHints.description: Optional related help articles such as 'Update the card used for your subscription'.

interfaces.name: setBillingCountry
interfaces.description: Update the billing country in Payment Settings, e.g., selecting 'United States' from the dropdown.

parameters.name: billingCountry
parameters.description: PaymentSettings.billing_country value, e.g., 'united_states', 'canada', 'other'.

interfaces.name: getProfileSettingsView
interfaces.description: Get the Profile Settings page data relevant to parental controls, including profiles, maturity levels, and PIN settings.

interfaces.name: updateProfileMaturityLevel
interfaces.description: Update the maturity level (e.g., to 'teens' / '13+') for a specific profile in Profile Settings.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: ProfileSettings.id of the profile to update.

parameters.name: maturityLevel
parameters.description: New maturity level, e.g., 'little_kids', 'older_kids', 'teens', 'adults'.

interfaces.name: updateProfilePinRequirement
interfaces.description: Enable or disable PIN requirement for a specific profile in Profile Settings.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: ProfileSettings.id whose PIN requirement will be changed.

parameters.name: pinRequiredForProfile
parameters.description: Whether a PIN is required to use this profile.

interfaces.name: updateProfilePin
interfaces.description: Conceptually set or update the PIN for a profile, including the PIN hint, aligning with PIN-related help articles.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: ProfileSettings.id for which to update the PIN.

parameters.name: pinSet
parameters.description: Whether a PIN should be considered set for this profile.

parameters.name: pinHint
parameters.description: Optional PIN hint to display in Profile Settings.

interfaces.name: getAboutHelpCenterContent
interfaces.description: Get the static content for the About page of the Help Center, including links back to key sections.

categoryCode.description: Optional Category.code if linking directly to a category like 'account_billing'.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfUseContent
interfaces.description: Get the content for the Terms of Use page, including references to billing, cancellations, and account usage, plus related help categories.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the content for the Privacy Policy page, including descriptions of data handling for support interactions and Help Center usage, plus links to account/profile management help.

interfaces.name: getAccessibilityHelpContent
interfaces.description: Get the content for the Accessibility page, including summary accessibility options and links to subtitles, captions & audio articles across devices.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSavedArticlesState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the SavedArticle state for the current user from storage.

helperFunctions.name: _recordSearchQuery
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist a SearchQuery record with filters, sort, and result_article_ids when searchHelpArticles is called.

helperFunctions.name: _createSupportRequestRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to construct and persist a SupportRequest entry based on submitSupportRequest or startSupportChat inputs.

helperFunctions.name: _loadOrInitializePaymentSettings
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the PaymentSettings state or create defaults if none exist.

helperFunctions.name: _loadProfileSettingsState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load existing ProfileSettings records for the current user.
